extraction_metadata.extractor: Claude Opus 4.8 (Cowork; single-pass, PDF text-layer bbox coordinate reconstruction of a landscape/rotated flowchart, marks PDF-authoritative)
extraction_metadata.extraction_notes: Novo Nordisk flowchart (Section 2), one logical main_soa table spanning printed Document pages 8-13; header (phase / Visit / Weeks / Window) repeats at each page break and is encoded once. Landscape/rotated (90 deg CCW): visits are columns, activities are rows; marks reconstructed from PDF text-layer word coordinates (poppler pdftotext -bbox) with the rotation-aware parser and validated against 150-240 dpi renders of ALL SIX pages. 25 visit columns V1..V25 (weeks -1..75); grid col = visit index + 1. Visit sequence: V1,V2,V3,V4,P5,V6,P7,V8,P9,V10,P11,V12,P13,V14,P15,V16,P17,V18,P19,V20,P21,V22,P23,V24,V25 (V3 is a clinic visit and P13 a phone contact - differs from sister trial NN9536-4376). Epochs: Screening=V1, Randomisation=V2, Dose escalation period=V3-V10 (merged cols 4-11), Maintenance period=P11-P23 (merged cols 12-24), End of treatment=V24, End of trial=V25. Windows: V1 '-7 to 0', V2 '±0', V3-V24 '±3', V25 '0 to +5'. Four grey section headers (SUBJECT RELATED / EFFICACY / SAFETY / OTHER ASSESSMENTS / TRIAL MATERIAL / REMINDERS -> six) at indent 0; sub-headers (Body measurements, Vital Signs x2, Clinical Outcome Assessments x2, Administration of trial product) at indent 1 with leaf rows at indent 2. Footnotes a-g captured. Two are CELL-level: 'e' on the DEXA scan V1 cell (Xe) and 'g' on the Attend-visit-fasting V25 cell (Xg); the rest are activity-name footnotes. The IWQoL-Lite and PGI-S rows were split (the rotated parser had merged their adjacent x-strips). Source spellings kept verbatim ('PK dairy', 'Systolic blood Pressure').

table_metadata.table_purpose: Semaglutide overweight/obesity trial (NN9536-4373): Screening, Randomisation (V2/week 0), Dose escalation period, Maintenance period, End of treatment (V24/week 68), End of trial (V25/week 75).
table_metadata.notes: Printed Document page numbers (8-13 of 104). Single logical flowchart; landscape/rotated presentation.

schedule_properties.property_comment: Top header band: Screening (V1), Randomisation (V2), Dose escalation period (V3-V10, merged), Maintenance period (P11-P23, merged), End of treatment (V24), End of trial (V25). Landscape/rotated flowchart; visits run as columns. Row-label cell (col 1) blank so property_name synthesized.
Visit identifiers V1..V25; 'V'=clinic visit, 'P'=phone contact. Label from source col-1 cell.
Nominal visit weeks: -1 (screening) through 75 (end of trial). Label from source.
Permitted visit windows in days: '-7 to 0' (screening), '±0' (V2 randomisation), '±3' most visits, '0 to +5' (end of trial). Label from source.

annotations.annotation_text: Demography consists of date of birth, sex, ethnicity, and race (according to local regulation).
Smoking is defined as smoking at least one cigarette or equivalent daily.
DEXA scan is performed in a sub-population.
DEXA scan should be performed in fasting state prior to randomisation (after informed consent is obtained).
Only for subjects where the separate informed consent for future research has been signed.
Fasting at V25 is defined as at least 2 hours without food and drink intake except water before attending the visit.
